query: SELECT 'orphaned_likes_by_user' as type, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM likes l LEFT JOIN users u ON l.userId = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'orphaned_saves_by_user', COUNT(*) FROM saves s LEFT JOIN users u ON s.userId = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'orphaned_likes_on_posts', COUNT(*) FROM likes l LEFT JOIN feedPosts fp ON l.postId = fp.id WHERE fp.id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'orphaned_saves_on_posts', COUNT(*) FROM saves s LEFT JOIN feedPosts fp ON s.postId = fp.id WHERE fp.id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'orphaned_reviews', COUNT(*) FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.userId = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'orphaned_wardrobe', COUNT(*) FROM wardrobeItems w LEFT JOIN users u ON w.userId = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'orphaned_notifications', COUNT(*) FROM notifications n LEFT JOIN users u ON n.userId = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'orphaned_follows', COUNT(*) FROM follows f LEFT JOIN users u ON f.followerId = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user RfxnZb4sKQE9yA3.root --database SGdPHKr3xPrRPbHA9C9esB --execute SELECT 'orphaned_likes_by_user' as type, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM likes l LEFT JOIN users u ON l.userId = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'orphaned_saves_by_user', COUNT(*) FROM saves s LEFT JOIN users u ON s.userId = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'orphaned_likes_on_posts', COUNT(*) FROM likes l LEFT JOIN feedPosts fp ON l.postId = fp.id WHERE fp.id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'orphaned_saves_on_posts', COUNT(*) FROM saves s LEFT JOIN feedPosts fp ON s.postId = fp.id WHERE fp.id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'orphaned_reviews', COUNT(*) FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.userId = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'orphaned_wardrobe', COUNT(*) FROM wardrobeItems w LEFT JOIN users u ON w.userId = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'orphaned_notifications', COUNT(*) FROM notifications n LEFT JOIN users u ON n.userId = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'orphaned_follows', COUNT(*) FROM follows f LEFT JOIN users u ON f.followerId = u.id WHERE u.id IS NULL;
